posts.text:
Senate Democrats won’t fund DHS, but they use their position to skip TSA security lines while Americans wait for hours—all while TSA agents work without pay.

When will this mess end? Watch this full Heritage Explains episode with @lora_ries for the details: heritage.org/heritage-explai…

Video

NEW: The Heritage Foundation is convening leading policymakers, national security and defense leaders, and private-sector executives from across the Western Hemisphere in Miami, Florida, for the inaugural Miami Security Forum to build partnerships and discuss how, together, we can combat our nations’ shared threats and create a stronger Hemisphere.

Learn more at miamisecurityforum.org

Video

Listen to our candid conversation from this morning with conservative women exploring policies and cultural renewal that truly support marriage, motherhood, and human flourishing. heritage.org/conservatism/ev…

“You can’t do it all at one time, but I would say put first things first. And getting the family worked out first and then figuring out the career after that.” - @JCNSeverino

Video
Watch our full event with conservative women exploring policies and cultural renewal that support marriage, motherhood, and human flourishing: heritage.org/conservatism/ev…

“ Both men and women ought to be called to a life of virtue. Both sexes need to hear the truth about sacrifice, commitment, and the selfless service that leads to fruitful relationships, whether that culminates in marriage or not. We’re here today to begin to lay out a better vision for women. One that while, unabashedly, is conservative, is not confined to the memes and caricatures that the left promotes of us.” - @JennGalardi

Video
Watch our full event with conservative women exploring policies and cultural renewal that support marriage, motherhood, and human flourishing: piped.video/watch?v=w2aD9dqk…
